description: Synthetic catastrophic-injury MACT case (severe traumatic brain injury + cervical cord injury) for a high-earning self-employed claimant. Engineered to contain exactly one cross-stream contradiction (accident date: police FIR 05/03/2026 vs hospital records 06/03/2026) and one in-stream correction (annual income revised upward by the authoritative ITR). All persons, firms, hospitals, and numbers are fictional and bear no relation to any real case or company.

expected_findings.contradiction: accident_date: police FIR says 2026-03-05; hospital records say 2026-03-06
expected_findings.correction: annual_income: 6500000 (preliminary CA certificate) superseded by 7200000 (ITR, authoritative)
